<{%fg 2%}>+ pulumi:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:providers:pkgA::-dashes]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::-dashes]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    [provider=urn:pulumi:test::test::pulumi:providers:pkgA::-dashes::153ae2b4-00d4-4d6d-a52b-0a998c0b557d]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typB: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>        [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA$pkgA:m:typB::-dashes]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 3 created<{%reset%}>
